name: Wagg Dog Food Active Chicken 12kg
description: This dry dog food contains meat meal and gravy (26%), whole grain barley, vegetable fiber, whole grain wheat, and maize in addition to whole linseeds rich in omega 3, chicken fat (2%), a great source of omega 6, minerals, vitamins, yucca, chicory roots, dried beet pulp and green peas. This hypoallergenic dog food is free from artificial colours, flavours, and additives and offers an unmatched taste and high nutritive value. The Wag dog food contains healthy probiotic FOS that aids in good digestive health; pets with sensitive digestive systems would love its delicious taste and would find relief with the probiotic content. Suitable for working dogs over 8 weeks old, this food has a crunchy texture that retains your pet’s interest in the food. These biscuits are excellent kibble with no added sugar; the rich-nutrient content of the food improves the stamina and vitality of your pets and improves their overall health. Product Dimensions: 11(D) x 37(W) x 73(H) Product Benefits Contains proteins and carbohydrates that improve their stamina and vitality No artificial color, flavor, and additives Contains yucca extract that reduces flatulent Oduors Crunchy kibble with no added sugar Easy to digest; contains probiotic FOS that eases digestion
shortDescription: This dry dog food contains meat meal and gravy (26%), whole grain barley, vegetable fiber, whole grain wheat, and maize in addition to whole linseeds
